About

Management Consultant at Accenture in New York, working at the intersection of technology strategy and financial services. My Integrated Business and Engineering background lets me work fluently across boardrooms and engineering teams alike.

From complex banking system migrations to high-stakes platform demos for ultra-high-net-worth clients, I thrive in cross-functional environments where analytical rigor and clear communication drive real results.

Bilingual in English and Mandarin. Outside of work: photography, aviation, running, and volleyball.
